member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainController
member.summary:
The per-bot tick driver. Each bot gets one BotBrainController instance. Every tick, Think() reads the world state and returns a PlayerInputSnapshot.
This is the single entry point for the bot system. The server calls Think() once per tick for each bot slot, then writes the result into the network player input dictionary before the simulation advances.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainController.RepathIntervalTicks
member.summary: How often (in ticks) the bot reconsiders its path.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainController.ObjectiveReevalIntervalTicks
member.summary: How often (in ticks) the bot re-evaluates its objective.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainController.Think(OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerEntity,OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld,OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerTeam)
member.summary: Produce a PlayerInputSnapshot for this bot for the current tick.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainController.Reset
member.summary: Reset the bot brain state. Call on respawn or team change.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotInputSynthesizer
member.summary: Assembles a PlayerInputSnapshot from steering output, aim position, and combat decisions. This is the final step: all the bot's thinking collapses into the same input struct that a human player's keyboard/mouse would produce.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotInputSynthesizer.MaxFireRange
member.summary: Maximum engagement range for firing weapons.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotInputSynthesizer.MinExplosiveFireRange
member.summary: Minimum engagement range (don't fire point-blank with explosives).

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavGraph
member.summary: A lightweight waypoint graph built from level geometry. Nodes are walkable positions; edges encode how to traverse between them.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavGraph.FindNearestNode(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Find the nearest node to a world position.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavGraph.FindPath(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerClass},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavEdgeBlock},System.Nullable{OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerTeam},System.Boolean)
member.summary: A* shortest path from startNode to goalNode. Returns null if no path exists.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNode
member.summary: A node in the navigation graph — a walkable position in world space.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNode.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single,OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNodeKind,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: A node in the navigation graph — a walkable position in world space.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNodeKind.Ledge
member.summary: Surface endpoint on a solid or platform.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNodeKind.Spawn
member.summary: Spawn point.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNodeKind.Objective
member.summary: Objective location (intel base, control point, etc.).

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavNodeKind.Surface
member.summary: Mid-surface waypoint for long platforms.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavEdge
member.summary: An edge connecting two nodes with a traversal type and cost.
An edge connecting two nodes with a traversal type and cost.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavEdgeKind.Walk
member.summary: Horizontal walk on the same surface.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavEdgeKind.Jump
member.summary: Jump required (edge-trigger Up).

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavEdgeKind.Fall
member.summary: Fall off a ledge (no input needed beyond walking off).

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavEdgeKind.Dropdown
member.summary: Drop through a dropdown platform (hold Down).

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavGraphBuilder
member.summary: Compatibility entry point for building a lightweight BotBrain navigation graph. The implementation lives in BotNavigationAssetBuilder so the same graph can be generated offline, serialized, shipped, and loaded without changing runtime users.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath
member.summary: The result of an A* pathfind — an ordered sequence of waypoint node indices.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.TotalCost
member.summary: Total path cost from start to goal.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.Count
member.summary: Number of waypoints in the path.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.CurrentIndex
member.summary: Index of the waypoint currently being pursued.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.IsComplete
member.summary: Whether all waypoints have been reached.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.CurrentNode
member.summary: The node index of the current waypoint, or -1 if complete.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.GoalNode
member.summary: The node index of the final waypoint.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.RemainingCount
member.summary: How many waypoints remain including the current one.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.Advance
member.summary: Advance to the next waypoint. Call this when the bot has reached the current one.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.NavPath.GetWaypoint(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the node index at a specific position in the path.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.ObjectiveEvaluator
member.summary: Evaluates the current game state and selects a macro-level goal position for the bot to navigate toward, based on the active game mode.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.ObjectiveEvaluator.EvaluateGoal(OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerEntity,OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld,OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerTeam,OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerEntity)
member.summary: Determine the bot's current goal position based on game mode and state. Returns a world (X, Y) position the bot should navigate toward.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainPracticeBotController.TryGetBotBrainController(System.Byte,OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotBrainController@)
member.summary: Test/diagnostic affordance: look up the per-slot brain controller. Intended for xUnit harnesses and debug overlays that need to read trace strings and graph state.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.IBotReactionController
member.summary: Interface for bot reaction/emote controllers that trigger chat bubble emotes based on observed game events. Implementations can be used client-side (practice) or server-side (online bots).

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.IBotReactionController.Reset
member.summary: Resets all reaction state for a fresh session.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.IBotReactionController.UpdateReactions(OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.Byte,OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.ControlledBotSlot},System.Nullable{OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents})
member.summary: Called once per simulation tick to update bot reaction states and trigger emotes.
member.param: The bot slots owned by this controller.
Optional observed events from other participants.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents
member.summary: Observed events from other participants that bots may react to.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents.LocalPlayerAcquiredWeapon
member.summary: Whether the local/authoritative player picked up a weapon.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents.LocalPlayerMultiKill
member.summary: Whether the local/authoritative player achieved a multi-kill (3+).

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents.LocalPlayerStartedRaging
member.summary: Whether the local/authoritative player started raging.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents.CaptureCelebration
member.summary: Whether a cap celebration should trigger.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedEvents.ObservedDeaths
member.summary: Positions and slots of observed bot deaths on the opposing team.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotObservedDeath
member.summary: Represents an observed bot death for reaction purposes. Uses raw float X/Y instead of Vector2 to avoid MonoGame dependency.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.BotReactionController
member.summary: Bot reaction state machine for Last-to-Die style emote behavior. This can be used client-side for practice bots or server-side for online bots.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.Reference.ModernGraphRouteCombatReference
member.summary: Dormant reference copy of the useful combat decisions from the removed ModernGraphRoute practice bot. This type is intentionally not used by runtime BotBrain code.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.LocalMotionController
member.summary: Stateful guard around primitive local driving. It prevents per-tick target chasing from degenerating into left/right/jump churn when the target is nearby but awkward.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.PrimitiveDirectDrive
member.summary: Small combat steering overlay for nearby visible enemies.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.SteeringMachine
member.summary: Converts a NavPath into raw Left/Right/Up/Down steering intent.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.AimResolver
member.summary: Computes aim position (AimWorldX, AimWorldY) for the bot. When engaging an enemy, aims at center-mass. When traversing, aims in movement direction.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.AimResolver.MaxAimJitter
member.summary: Maximum random aim offset to prevent robotic snap-aiming.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.AimResolver.TraversalAimAheadDistance
member.summary: How far ahead to aim when traversing (no combat target).

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.AimResolver.CombatAimVerticalOffset
member.summary: Vertical offset to aim slightly above center-mass for better hit probability.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.TargetSelector
member.summary: Selects the best enemy target for the bot to engage. Picks nearest alive enemy on the opposing team.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.TargetSelector.MaxEngagementRange
member.summary: Maximum engagement distance. Beyond this, the bot won't try to fight.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.BotBrain.TargetSelector.SelectTarget(OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerEntity,OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld,OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerTeam)
member.summary: Find the best target to engage, or null if no valid target exists.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.CustomMapBuilderEntityNormalization
member.summary: Converts between legacy GG2 entity type names and simplified editor-facing types with property bags.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.CustomMapBuilderEntityNormalization.TryUpgradeLegacyToModern(OpenGarrison.Core.CustomMapBuilderEntity,OpenGarrison.Core.CustomMapBuilderEntity@)
member.summary: Optional upgrade path: convert legacy entities to modern editor types (does not run automatically on open).

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.CustomMapEntityRuntimeRegistry
member.summary: Extensible registry for map entity types used by the modern builder and runtime import. Register additional implementations to add new entity kinds.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.CustomMapRoomObjectFactory
member.summary: Creates runtime instances from map entity type names. Shared by legacy import and modern entity handlers.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld.ClientPredictionMode
member.summary: When true, only the local player and projectiles are simulated. Other network players, match logic, and structures are skipped. Used for client-side prediction in multiplayer.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld.TryRegisterServerTerminatedProjectilePlayerHitEffect(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,OpenGarrison.Core.PlayerTeam,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: When a client-predicted projectile is removed by the server snapshot before the local simulation detected the hit, fire a blood effect at the nearest enemy player along the projectile's backward trajectory. This recovers visual feedback (blood, plugin damage sounds) that would otherwise be silently dropped due to latency-induced position divergence between server and client.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld.FilterTerminatedProjectiles``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Int32})
member.summary: Returns the input list with any entries whose ID is already in removed. Baseline-preserved states for locally-terminated projectiles must not ghost-respawn them while the server's EntityRemoval contribution is still in transit. Allocates a new list only when at least one entry is filtered; otherwise returns the original reference (zero allocation on the common path).

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Core.SimulationWorld.SpawnClientBloodFromDamage(System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32)
member.summary: Spawns blood client-side based on damage events from the server.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Core.ClientSnapshotStringCache
member.summary: Client-side string cache that resolves cache IDs to strings. Receives cache updates from server snapshots.
